# Authorization Matrix

**Coverage stats**: 102 endpoints/operations discovered | 50 endpoints with no guard detected | 34 endpoints taking object-id/path/store/query parameters

**Frameworks covered**: h3 local HTTP routes, Node `http` servers, `ws` WebSocket upgrades, SSE/event-stream handlers, oclif CLI command classes, Shopify CLI developer-platform/theme/store auth helpers.

**Coverage gaps**:
- External `@shopify/cli-hydrogen` command implementations and `@oclif/plugin-*` commands are imported but not present in this repository.
- App reverse proxy forwards to user application processes; routes implemented by the user app are dynamic and out of repo scope.
- Theme dev and extension dev catch-all handler ordering is framework-driven; matrix rows group catch-all behavior by handler family rather than every possible URL.
- CodeQL `entry-points.json` mostly lists source expressions rather than framework route metadata; route enumeration was cross-checked against Stage 03 architecture inventory and direct grep.

| # | Boundary | Method | Path / Operation | Handler (file:line) | Roles / Expected Scope | Expected Checks | Actual Checks (Layer 1/2/3) | Object-ID Param | Ownership / Tenant Check | Anomaly |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

| 6 | HTTP h3 | POST | `/graphiql/graphql.json?key=<key>` | `packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/graphiql/server.ts:233` | self/dev-session | Key-gate before token-bearing Admin GraphQL request. | `query.key !== key` returns 404 before `readBody`/`X-Shopify-Access-Token` request. | — | n/a | — |
